calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Substitute Attornwey Of Record Without Prior Counsel Consent
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION TO SUBSTITUTE ATTORNEY OF RECORD WITHOUT PRIOR COUNSEL CONSENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
